╔════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║                                                                    ║
║    🎬 YOUTUBE COMMENT MONITOR - QUICK START                       ║
║                                                                    ║
║    For: Concessa Obvius Channel                                   ║
║    Status: ✅ PRODUCTION READY                                     ║
║    Created: 2026-04-20 01:00 PDT                                  ║
║                                                                    ║
╚════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝

📋 WHAT THIS SYSTEM DOES:

   ✓ Fetches comments every 30 minutes
   ✓ Categorizes into 4 types (Questions, Praise, Spam, Sales)
   ✓ Auto-responds to Questions & Praise
   ✓ Flags Sales inquiries for review
   ✓ Logs everything with full audit trail
   ✓ Generates reports & analytics

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🚀 GET STARTED IN 3 STEPS (5 MINUTES):

   Step 1: Run Setup
   ────────────────
   bash ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/setup.sh

   Step 2: Test It Works
   ─────────────────────
   python3 ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube_monitor.py

   Step 3: View Report
   ───────────────────
   python3 ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/report_generator.py


   That's it! The system runs automatically every 30 minutes. 🎯

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📁 MAIN FILES:

   youtube_monitor.py         ← Main monitoring script
   report_generator.py        ← Reports & analytics
   setup.sh                   ← Setup wizard (use this first)
   CRON_CONFIG.sh             ← Install scheduler
   requirements.txt           ← Python dependencies
   README.md                  ← Full documentation

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

⚙️ MANUAL SETUP (if not using setup.sh):

   1. Install dependencies:
      pip install -r requirements.txt

   2. Configure OAuth:
      python3 youtube_monitor.py --setup-auth

   3. Test run:
      python3 youtube_monitor.py

   4. Install cron (every 30 minutes):
      bash CRON_CONFIG.sh


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📊 COMMON COMMANDS:

   # View interactive report
   python3 report_generator.py

   # Show all statistics
   python3 report_generator.py --full

   # Show flagged comments (sales inquiries)
   python3 report_generator.py --flagged

   # Show last 6 hours
   python3 report_generator.py --hours 6

   # Check cron logs
   tail -f ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/cron.log

   # Verify cron job installed
   crontab -l


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📖 DOCUMENTATION:

   README.md                 Complete user guide
   AUTH_SETUP.md             OAuth 2.0 configuration
   IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE.md   Technical details
   DELIVERABLES.md           Full inventory
   YOUTUBE_COMMENT_MONITOR_FINAL.md  Complete summary


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎯 COMMENT CATEGORIZATION:

   Category 1: Questions
   ├─ Keywords: how-to, cost, timeline, tools, when, where
   └─ Action: ✅ Auto-reply with helpful response

   Category 2: Praise
   ├─ Keywords: amazing, inspiring, love, thanks, brilliant
   └─ Action: ✅ Auto-reply with thank you

   Category 3: Spam
   ├─ Keywords: crypto, bitcoin, MLM, "make money", follow
   └─ Action: 🚫 Ignore (no response)

   Category 4: Sales
   ├─ Keywords: partnership, collaboration, sponsor, advertise
   └─ Action: 🚩 Flag for manual review

   Category 0: Other
   └─ Action: 🚫 Ignore (no response)


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔧 TROUBLESHOOTING:

   Q: "Credentials file not found"
   A: python3 youtube_monitor.py --setup-auth

   Q: "Channel not found"
   A: Edit youtube_monitor.py line ~47, verify exact channel name

   Q: "No comments fetched"
   A: Check YouTube API enabled, verify channel has public comments

   Q: "Cron not running"
   A: Check: crontab -l
      Check logs: tail ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/cron.log


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✨ FEATURES:

   ✓ Automated 30-minute intervals
   ✓ State tracking (no duplicates)
   ✓ OAuth 2.0 authentication
   ✓ 4-category intelligent classification
   ✓ Auto-response system
   ✓ JSONL logging
   ✓ Interactive reports
   ✓ Flagging system
   ✓ Error handling
   ✓ Production ready


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📞 SUPPORT:

   All documentation is in ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/

   START HERE:
   1. README.md (overview + usage)
   2. IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE.md (technical details)
   3. AUTH_SETUP.md (if having OAuth issues)


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎬 READY? Let's go!

   bash ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/setup.sh

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
